problem_statement: Design a bounded, reproducible evaluation for dialect text classification.
scope: Offline, small-scale evaluation of dialect text classification; no production deployment.
research_questions: Which evidence supports the evaluation design for dialect text classification?
Which controlled comparison isolates the main failure mode?

evidence_gaps.description: Verifiable evidence for dialect text classification.
A controlled evaluation using macro F1.

search_queries.query: dialect text classification controlled comparison macro F1

success_criteria: All claims bind to accepted evidence
The primary metric is macro F1
risks: Small samples may produce unstable estimates
